items.title: US strikes Iran after attack on cargo ship
items.summary: Iran accuses the US of violating their deal and says it struck targets linked to American forces in response.

items.title: Hospital Opens Roof Garden Where Critical Care Patients Can Enjoy the Outdoors for Hours With Full Care
items.summary: A hospital in south London opened a garden on its rooftop where Critical Care patients can spend hours in the fresh air and sunlight. ICU patients visiting the rooftop garden receive “full life suppor…
